reviews.review_description: My son was happy to get the "Everything Cosmetics" on this wanna-be Gorilla Tag game. I let him spend his birthday money, $35 on it. Now he's learning what a scam is! I told him these games take your money give you fake mods and get shut down because the real game fights it. We want his money back or the replacement!! Will be following through with this. Might dispute the charges through my bank! You love Israel? Then do the right thing!

reviews.review_title: Good game but just need to fix things
reviews.review_description: The game is honestly good, it’s very fun to play with your friends and people, but when you play for a while or just have a lot of cosmetics you crash. And if happens all the time. I would like the developers to fix this. And the moderator need to start being in the game more, there’s a lot of toxicity and racism in a lot of serves but other wise this game is good. I do recommend playing just need a few touch ups

reviews.review_title: If you want your money back read this
reviews.review_description: This was an amazing game but I was reading the ratings and this is why you can’t get your money back.The owner of this game was qwizix but he didn’t have enough money to keep servers up it was costing crazy amount of money but when you bought the stuff if you read it it said will not be able to refund that is on every one who bought it then he announced that the game was going to be shut down and not to buy stuff because you wouldn’t get your money back and it would be a waste of money to do so. So before you write a review about it read this and realize it is y’all’s fault yall didn’t read it. But anyway this was a really great game
